entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: A recalcitrant crop targeted for improvement through biotechnological approaches and in vitro regeneration.

entities.name: IN VITRO REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of regenerating plants from tissues or cells in a controlled environment.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL APPROACHES
entities.description: The application of biological systems and organisms to technical and industrial processes for crop improvement.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: The use of algorithms to predict and optimize in vitro regeneration protocols.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORK
entities.description: A class of machine learning algorithms used for predicting regeneration outcomes.

entities.name: MATURE EMBRYOS
entities.description: The biological material from common bean used for pretreatment.

entities.name: BENZYLAMINOPURINE
entities.description: A cytokinin used in pretreatment and post-treatment media to induce shoot regeneration.

entities.name: PLUMULAR APICE
entities.description: The specific explant isolated from mature embryos for in vitro regeneration.

entities.name: SHOOT REGENERATION FREQUENCY
entities.description: The rate or probability of shoot formation from explants.

entities.name: SHOOT COUNT
entities.description: The number of shoots produced per explant.

entities.name: SHOOT LENGTH
entities.description: The physical length of the regenerated shoots.

entities.name: MULTILAYER PERCEPTRON
entities.description: A specific artificial neural network model used for the best prediction and optimization of output variables.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of improving crop traits through genetic and biotechnological means.

entities.name: PLANT TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: The general technique of growing plant cells or tissues in vitro.
